microsoft_ft: Owned **program charters** (scope, OKRs, timeline, risks, dependencies) for Azure's recovery validation program, scaling a 2-person operation into a platformized system sustaining **45+ annual resilience drills** and driving **$14M+ business impact** across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 delivery** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, partnering directly with engineers to define requirements and self-service scheduling workflows that **cut operational toil 30%** and moved chaotic execution into a structured, sustainable framework.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, shipping a rack-level drill program in **4 months** with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a repeatable model for continuous infrastructure validation.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility across global time zones, including bridge-leading a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract** with zero customer-impacting incidents.

Revamped chaotic planning workflows into structured operational frameworks by building an **internal AI agent** for drill planning, **reducing cycle time 39%** and increasing drill capacity **21%** while freeing engineers to focus on technical design.

Organized recurring **program reviews, design reviews, and steering forums** that vetted infrastructure initiatives, accelerated engineering velocity, and resolved cross-team operational bottlenecks across partner, hardware, and platform engineering orgs.
microsoft_2023: Drove **adoption of AI-driven code generation workflows** across 14 Azure service teams via hands-on demos, training, and stakeholder enablement, **saving 37 engineering hours monthly** and embedding LLM-powered tooling into daily developer workflows.

Influenced the product roadmap for **intent-based YAML generation** by facilitating **11+ structured user interviews** with Azure service teams, synthesizing feedback into prioritized feature gaps that shaped the next quarter's engineering investments.

Optimized data integrity and retrieval by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, **cutting lookup time 83%** and improving knowledge access for distributed engineering teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions **28% faster** by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning **140+ engineering teams** across multiple time zones.

Mobilized a program strategy to mitigate operational toil during region launches, conducting discovery with **20+ service teams** to surface 81 hours of manual effort per region and building a roadmap to automate critical-path workflows.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target automation gaps, prioritize high-impact support, and convert chaotic launch processes into a structured, measurable framework.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot OS migration by defining the program strategy, mapping dependencies across **1,200+ stations**, and orchestrating execution with IT, Operations, and Engineering stakeholders.

Facilitated **Agile ceremonies** — sprint planning, standups, retrospectives — and prioritized the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilizing the developer intake process and accelerating delivery of infrastructure work.

Drove cross-functional alignment to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, **accelerating software deployment cycles 25%** and reducing manual handoffs between fulfillment-center engineering and platform teams.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings **26%** by optimizing operations and managing the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for **200+ monthly proposals** through a redesigned CRM process and standardized intake workflow.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost **13%** and lifted conversions **2.7%** by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy that revamped the website, Google profile, and lead-routing funnel end-to-end.

Improved leadership pricing models by running financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, surfacing margin leaks and informing data-backed pricing decisions adopted across the franchise.

tailoring_notes: Mirrored DeepMind JD vocabulary: program charters, design reviews, operational bottlenecks, structured frameworks, agile, global time zones.
Re-titled all roles to Program Manager variants to match the PgM-distinct-from-PM/Eng requirement.
Expanded MSFT FT to 6 bullets to fill page and surface AI infra, engineer partnership, and process-revamp themes.
